title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
